channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NAACP asks judge to protect against ‘misuse’ of voter data seized by FBI in Georgia’s Fulton County
Shooting reported at high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, police on scene
item.description: Law enforcement agents are on the scene of a reported shooting at a high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island. CBS News' Shanelle Kaul and An...

item.title: Obama slams social media "clown show" after Trump's racist post
item.description: In an appearance on a podcast hosted by Brian Tyler Cohen published on Saturday, former President Barack Obama criticized the tone of political discou...

item.title: Robert Duvall, star of 'The Godfather,' 'Apocalypse Now,' dead at 95
item.description: Robert Duvall, star of 'The Godfather,' 'Apocalypse Now,' has died at age 95.

item.title: U.S. military preparing for potential Iran operations if Trump orders attack
item.description: The U.S. military is preparing for potential operations with Iran if President Trump orders an attack. Iran's top diplomat has arrived in Geneva ahead...

item.title: Slavery exhibits must be restored at President's House Site, judge orders
item.description: The National Park Service and federal officials must restore the slavery exhibits to the President's House Site in Philadelphia, a judge orders.

item.title: Shooting reported at high school hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island
item.description: The ATF said it would assist police responding to reports of a shooting during a high school boys' hockey game in Pawtucket, Rhode Island.

item.title: Opening statements held in the trial of a Georgia high school shooting suspect’s father
WATCH: UPS driver terrorized by wild turkeys in Connecticut
item.description: This UPS driver was lucky to drive away unscathed after a wild run-in with a couple of turkeys on the streets of Branford, Connecticut.

item.title: WATCH: Woman surprises husband with pregnancy news during workout
item.description: Adorable viral video shows the moment an Arizona woman surprised her husband in the middle of their workout by revealing the couple was expecting thei...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspect’s backpack
item.description: Investigators working on the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother are consulting with Walmart management to develop leads.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Guthrie family cleared as possible suspects, sheriff says
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: WATCH: Rescue crew saves swan stuck on frozen pond
item.description: Rescue crews saved a swan that got stuck to the surface of a frozen pond in Rye, New York. Police said the swan was taken to a local animal rescue and...
